title: cleome lanceolata
intro: Cleome lanceolata, also known as Mexican bee plant or yellow bee plant, is a flowering plant species in the Cleomaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and even exhibiting potential antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, Cleome lanceolata can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
